## formatContentPath() function

Format only the path portion of a relative or root-absolute content reference. Unicode and valid percent escapes are preserved byte-for-byte unless a host explicitly supplies a segment transform.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function formatContentPath(value: string, options?: FormatContentPathOptions): string;
```
